subtitle: Review obligations, design-shaping constraints, and validation hotspots before design freezes them.

sections.title: Highest-Impact Obligations
sections.label: Obligation
sections.why: Lead with the obligations most likely to constrain design and scope.

sections.title: Data, Integration, and Validation Hotspots
sections.label: Hotspots
sections.why: Use a matrix when multiple dimensions of coverage need to be scanned together.

sections.title: Constraints that Shape Design
sections.label: Constraint
sections.why: Frame constraints as explicit checks the design must satisfy.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: Keep requirement-level approval calls dense and direct.

sections.title: Requirement Risks and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Open Issues
sections.why: Keep unresolved details visible before they distort design.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Decision gates
glance_cards.hint: Approvals that fix the requirement baseline.

glance_cards.label: Open issues
glance_cards.hint: Risks or TODO: Confirm items still in play.
glance_cards.section_title: Requirement Risks and TODO: Confirm Items

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact requirement quotes.
